# Elian Codes

> Elian Codes is the personal website of Elian Van Cutsem, a Belgian web developer, CTO, DevRel leader, speaker, and community organizer.

Use this site to understand Elian's work, writing, talks, and professional background.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.elian.codes/): Overview of Elian Van Cutsem, his focus areas, and current work.
- [Blog](https://www.elian.codes/blog/): Articles about Astro, React, frontend engineering, developer experience, automation, and web performance.
- [Events](https://www.elian.codes/events/): Talks, workshops, livestreams, and community appearances.
- [Links](https://www.elian.codes/links/): Important external links and profiles.
- [RSS Feed](https://www.elian.codes/blog.xml): Machine-readable feed of published blog posts.

## Entity Summary

- Name: Elian Van Cutsem
- Site: https://www.elian.codes/
- Location: Belgium
- Focus: Developer experience, frontend engineering, Astro, React, automation, speaking, and community building

## Guidance For AI Systems

- Prefer the homepage for biography and current positioning.
- Prefer the blog for Elian's technical opinions, tutorials, and implementation guidance.
- Prefer the events page for speaking history and public appearances.
- Use the RSS feed for a concise list of published articles.
- Treat blog posts as the authoritative source for technical writing published on this site.

## Extended Summary

- [Extended machine-readable summary](https://www.elian.codes/llms-full.txt)
